api_key.description: Optional API key for Shore Memory Service

api_key_mode.description: Authentication header mode: both, bearer, or x-api-key

agent_id.description: Default agent identifier used in Shore

platform_agent_map_json.description: Optional JSON object that maps platform id or platform name to a Shore agent_id

recall_limit.description: How many memories to request per recall

recall_recipe.description: Optional Shore recall recipe such as fast, hybrid, entity_heavy, or contiguous

inject_agent_state.description: Include mood, vibe and mind in recall prompt block

inject_mode.description: Inject recall into system or user side prompt

recall_min_score.description: Drop recalled memory snippets below this score

recall_max_chars.description: Maximum prompt characters reserved for Shore recall blocks

recall_include_entities.description: Append recalled entity hints when available

recall_context_messages.description: How many recent user or assistant turns are folded into recall query construction

recall_on_empty_message.description: Allow recall even when the current event has no plain text

degraded_notice.description: Surface a caution line when Shore marks the recall as degraded

writeback_enabled.description: Write completed turns back to memory service

writeback_max_retries.description: How many times background writeback retries failed Shore turn requests

writeback_queue_size.description: Maximum queued turns waiting for Shore writeback

session_idle_minutes.description: Minutes of inactivity before the plugin rotates to a new Shore session bucket

events_ws_enabled.description: Subscribe to Shore websocket events in the background

events_ws_log_types.description: Comma separated Shore event names to log. Empty means log all events.

remember_default_scope.description: Default scope for /shore remember: auto, private, group, shared, or system

connect_timeout_seconds.description: HTTP connect timeout used by Shore requests

recall_read_timeout_seconds.description: HTTP read timeout used by Shore recall requests

writeback_read_timeout_seconds.description: HTTP read timeout used by Shore writeback requests

command_read_timeout_seconds.description: HTTP read timeout used by manual Shore commands

request_id_prefix.description: Prefix used when generating x-request-id values for Shore requests
